calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Scott Weaver, Clerk Kay Peek, Reporter JoAnn Bryce (206)

Appearances: Arnold Evje, Esquire for Plaintiff; Wayne Colson, defendant in pro per, defendant Leigh Toth is not present

After settlement conference off the record, a stipulation for judgment is placed on the record. Plaintiff shall have judgment for restitution and possession of the premises at 655 Powell Street, No. 306. Defendants represent they have vacated the premises and returned the keys. Plaintiff will keep the security deposit and provide a neutral letter of reference. Plaintiffs' agent will inspect premises. If premises are vacated, Plaintiff will file a dismissal with prejudice and waive all back rent and damages. Parties understand and agree to the settlement placed on the record this date. Trial is vacated.

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
